name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_error_budget
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeErrorBudget groups transient cruise skew wake result seeds by preset axial plane and sweep column for lab diagnostics.
note: Primary aggregate error budget for transient cruise skew wake evidence.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_result_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeResultSeed supplies per rotor pressure velocity arrival time and momentum validation seeds.
note: Rotor level seed input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_validation_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeValidationRunMatrix supplies live run status and observed evidence slots.
note: Live run execution status input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_readiness_gate
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeReadinessGate controls whether live validation rows may become pending.
note: Readiness gate input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_temporal_resolution
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTemporalResolution supplies timing constraints for transient skew wake samples.
note: Transient timing constraint input.

name: l2_powered_cruise_skew_wake_transit
value: Aerodynamics4McL2PoweredCruiseSkewWakeTransit supplies target pressure wake speed arrival time and momentum bounds.
note: Physics target input.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for future live transient powered cruise skew wake validation.
note: Upstream CFD target for live evidence.
